paragraphs: BTC closed -0.83% to $76,564 on a 1/20 green breadth print as risk-off rotation deepens. BTC ETF outflows hit $1.55B over six sessions while the spot bid concentrates into AI-compute leaders RENDER, FET, NEAR, WLD, and TIA. The trending slate rotated wholesale off the multi-day Privacy/ZK and perp-DEX leaders in one session.

Perps-scan reads QUIET with three ACCUMULATION DIVERGENT prints surfacing from yesterday's fully NEUTRAL universe — ZEC, TAO, and INJ. Taker buy under 50% on every print means passive position building, not aggressive directional bid. Funding stays calm across the 22 NEUTRAL stalwarts, the structural footprint reads as positioning rather than conviction.

Narrative-tracker DEMOTED Hyperliquid Peak to Fading on the second FADE-PEAK-FADE whipsaw in a week, PROMOTED RWA to full RIDE on the Ondo/TermMax tokenized-stock collateral launch, and dropped Post-Quantum to DEAD after the 48h escalation window passed unmet. The AI-compute sector sweeping 7 of 8 winner slots is the cleanest cross-confirm of the day.
market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · long AI-compute leaders with sector confluence, fade perp-DEX exposure after the second whipsaw and book the structural break on Hyperliquid.

current_positions.thesis_note: narrative-tracker DEMOTED Hyperliquid Peak to Fading on the second whipsaw in a week, token-movers rotated HYPE off trending, AIXBT named hot-potato rotation warning on the cycle-leader trio — structural sector thesis cracked, close with invalidation already breached on the ledger from prior session
current_positions.invalidation: close below $56, OR clean break below the post-June-6-unlock settlement low

current_positions.thesis_note: smart-money exit thesis intact, risk-off tape with breadth 1/20 green supports the short, no fresh BCH catalyst
current_positions.watch: if breadth recovers above 10/20 green tomorrow alongside BTC reclaiming $77.5K, the legacy-alt bounce risk activates

current_positions.thesis_note: AI-compute sector sweep is exactly the tailwind the thesis predicted — 7 of 8 winner slots today go to RENDER, FET, NEAR, WLD, TIA, GRASS, GRT
current_positions.watch: if RENDER and FET both close red tomorrow with AI-compute losing its winners-list dominance, the sector cross-confirm breaks

current_positions.thesis_note: Decentralized compute Peak 5/5 RIDE held in narrative-tracker for second straight session, AI-compute sector dominant on a 1/20 green tape
current_positions.watch: if AKT drops off CoinGecko trending for a second consecutive session while RENDER and FET keep leading, capital may be skipping the second-tier compute names entirely

current_positions.thesis_note: Hyperliquid sector lead DEMOTED to Fading in narrative-tracker today, perp-DEX bid rotated off the trending list wholesale — the named risk that ASTER follows HYPE structurally has fired, close to free capital before the second-derivative unwind plays out

thesis: RENDER printed +14.2% 24h on $258M volume with vol/mcap 0.21 — high turnover with the AI-compute peer set leading while TAO digests at +1.1% 24h.
Today's token-call rated RENDER HIGH conviction at 9/10. Salad Network integration adds roughly 60,000 enterprise GPUs to the network, AI compute now drives 35-40% of Render jobs.
Narrative-tracker holds Decentralized compute at Peak 5/5 RIDE for the second straight session. Token burns up 278% year-over-year confirm real demand, not narrative speculation.
Token-movers shows AI-compute sweeping 7 of 8 winner slots (WLD, NEAR, RENDER, FET, TIA, GRASS, GRT) — the dominant cross-sector rotation on a 1/20 green tape.
risks: OTOY Treasury 23.3% and partner escrow 26.6% unlock on cliffs through 2051 — schedule overhang sits ready to land at any time.
Centralized clouds like AWS and CoreWeave undercut the DePIN thesis on price — institutional GPU flows may rotate back to traditional compute.
EIGEN and AKT already hold the AI-compute sector long. RENDER concentrates rather than diversifies — sector unwind hits all three together.

thesis: TAO printed first-day ACCUMULATION DIVERGENT on +15.71% 7d open-interest build with funding +0.0054%/8h holding well under the +0.03% extreme gate.
Bittensor Q1 2026 revenue $43M anchors the fundamentals — real AI service revenue, not narrative speculation. The metric distinguishes TAO from the broader DePIN trade.
Narrative-tracker holds Decentralized compute at Peak 5/5 RIDE for the second straight session. The new DePAI wrapper label extends the catalyst stack into AI-infra framing.
Top-trader long/short at 1.98 with -0.10 over 7 days means smart money built the position through consolidation without piling in late.
risks: DIVERGENT sub-tag means taker buy 46.68% under the 50% gate — the bid hasn't crossed the spread yet, the passive build could be arbitrage rather than directional positioning.
AI-compute sector concentration risk — EIGEN, AKT, RENDER all hold the same thesis. Rotation away from AI hits all four positions in the same session.
Decentralized compute is at Peak status, not Rising — late-cycle entry on a digesting narrative. A narrative-tracker downgrade to Fading reverses the sector tailwind.

watchlist.trigger: first pullback to $620 that holds with funding turning positive AND top-trader long/short rotating back above 1.00, OR a clean ACCUMULATION confirmation tomorrow with taker buy clearing 50%
thesis: ZEC ACCUMULATION DIVERGENT print fires today — open interest +20.07% 7d on +7.32% price, funding turned positive at +0.0107%/8h.
Narrative-tracker holds Privacy/ZK at Rising 4/5 RIDE — institutional bid sustains via Multicoin Capital framing and Grayscale ETF filing even as X chatter cools.
Top-trader long/short 0.77 holds net short. The squeeze setup loads if the narrative cross-bid pulls top traders back above parity.

watchlist.trigger: first pullback to the $3.50 area that holds with ZEC also above $640 OR a second privacy name printing green on the same session
thesis: Privacy/ZK held RIDE at 4/5 in narrative-tracker today even as X chatter cooled to a single direct driver — institutional bid carries the thesis.
RAIL rotated off the trending list today alongside ZEC, but the multi-day base structure holds. Real usage anchors via $92M TVL, $4.7M revenue, $2B+ shielded volume.
Capital is fragmenting across multiple privacy names (Aleo, Tachyon, Umbra surface in today's aixbt-pulse) so RAIL needs sector continuation rather than narrative escalation.

watchlist.trigger: funding pushes past +0.08%/8h with pct_24h going flat-to-red, OR pct_24h reverses past -5% with open interest flipping negative
thesis: PLAY funding cooled to +0.0422%/8h from yesterday's +0.0730% peak — distribution signature loading but the trigger gate at +0.08% sits 0.0378pp away.
Open interest dropped -19.21% 24h — leverage already unwinding without a price flush. Thin float (OI $18.6M) means coordinated flow drives both squeezes and flushes.
Top-trader long/short 1.15 down -0.52 over 7 days means smart money cut conviction through the rip. A price-down day paired with funding pushing past +0.08% fires the trigger.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h second leg past +20% with volume ratio crossing 2.0x, OR funding flipping positive past +0.03%/8h on continued pct_7d above +40%
thesis: WLD printed +18.4% 24h on $342M volume at #63 cap with [TRENDING+UP][BREAKOUT] tags — the only structurally clean breakout on today's board.
Perps-scan WATCH cleared three of four CATALYST-BREAKOUT gates — OI +11.80% 24h on OI +96.39% 7d with taker buy 50.21%. Pct_24h gate at +20% is the binding constraint.
AI/Worldcoin narrative folds into the broader AI-compute sector sweep — WLD leads the trending rotation onto AI-identity names alongside the AI-infra trio.

watchlist.trigger: close above $0.45 with 24h volume above 1.5x the 7d average AND open interest net positive on the day, reversing today's [TRENDING+DOWN] print
thesis: Narrative-tracker PROMOTED RWA from RIDE-with-trail to full RIDE today on the Ondo/TermMax tokenized-stock collateral launch on BNB Chain — first fixed-rate borrowing market for tokenized stocks.
Ondo also brings tokenized US stocks to Hyperliquid HyperEVM today — cross-narrative anchor extends the RWA institutional loop into perp DEX infrastructure.
ONDO printed -2.25% 24h and rotated to [TRENDING+DOWN] today despite the catalyst — retail rotation off the name leaves the bid loaded for the next confirmation candle.

evaluations.note: Day 5/multi-week. Price $59.666 above $56 invalidation today, but the ledger entry already carries sticky invalidation_breached=true from prior session. Narrative-tracker DEMOTED Hyperliquid Peak to Fading — the second FADE-PEAK-FADE whipsaw in a week, the pattern is the signal. Token-movers rotated HYPE off the trending list wholesale. AIXBT named hot-potato rotation warning on the HYPE/ZEC/NEAR cycle-leader trio. Perps-scan smart-money exit into day seven. Multiple structural signals = structural break. CLOSE.

Day 4/7. BCH absent from today's 25-asset perps slice and from token-movers winners/losers/trending — price estimated near $342 from BTC -0.83% on a risk-off tape with breadth 1/20 green. Structural smart-money-exit thesis intact, no fresh catalyst defends the bid. Invalidation $370 well above. RIDE.

Day 3/7. EIGEN absent from today's perps slice and token-movers refreshes — price estimated near $0.231. AI-compute sector sweeps 7 of 8 winner slots today (WLD, NEAR, RENDER, FET, TIA, GRASS, GRT) — the named sector tailwind from the original thesis is firing exactly as predicted. AI agents and Decentralized compute both Peak 5/5 RIDE in narrative-tracker. Invalidation $0.205 holds well clear. RIDE.

Day 2/7. AKT absent from today's perps slice and not in today's top winners or trending refresh — price estimated near $0.90 from yesterday's $0.9042 print on a flat 1h tape for the AI-compute pack. Narrative-tracker holds Decentralized compute Peak 5/5 RIDE for second straight session; the new DePAI wrapper framing extends the catalyst stack. Invalidation $0.78 holds. RIDE.

Day 2/7. ASTER dropped out of today's 25-asset perps slice (entered yesterday's universe as new entrant). Price estimated near $0.71 from yesterday evening's $0.7138 print. Hyperliquid sector lead DEMOTED to Fading in narrative-tracker today, the perp-DEX bid rotated off trending list wholesale. Named risk #3 from original thesis (ASTER follows HYPE structurally) has fired. Close to free capital before the second-derivative unwind plays out. CLOSE.

Hyperliquid sector lead DEMOTED to Fading in narrative-tracker today; perp-DEX bid rotated off trending list wholesale in one session; the named risk that ASTER is a second-derivative trade behind HYPE has fired — close before the unwind plays out

TermMax launch may not extend to a second integration this week — the catalyst stack becomes single-anchored.
